title: Waddon1's Performance Modpack 26.1.2
description: A Fabric based modpack designed to be used for Vanilla play with better performance and client-side quality of life improvements. Also optimised for Steam Deck
body: A Fabric based modpack designed to be used for vanilla singleplayer or multiplayer server. It includes a multitude of performance mods and quality of life improvements e.g. minimap, waypoints, recipes. "Waddon1's Performance Modpack is the best thing since sliced bread!" - Waddon1 (Doesn't actually contain magic. Just science) **Also optimised and Fully Functional on Steam Deck** **Sponsored by Meloncube** Want a fast and afforable Minecraft server that is easy to set up use Meloncube! **Get 25% off your first month by using code "waddon1"**
